title: neoaulacolepis petelotii
intro: Neoaulacolepis petelotii, also known as the Vietnamese plum or Kha Ma, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to Vietnam and widely used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Neoaulacolepis petelotii include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional Vietnamese medicine, Neoaulacolepis petelotii is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other medicinal plants, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
